auth.patHint: HTTPS PAT for git authentication. Leave empty for public repos.
auth.sshKeyHint: Paste your SSH private key (OpenSSH or PEM format)
auth.publicKeyHint: Add this public key to your Git provider (e.g. GitHub → Settings → SSH keys)

clone.advancedHint: Name and email written to each git commit. Leave blank to use the default{suffix}.

validation.errUrlFormat: URL must be HTTPS or SSH format (e.g. git{'@'}host:user/repo.git)
validation.errSshKeyRequired: SSH private key is required for SSH URLs

create.heading: Create a new store
create.intro: Generate an identity and seed a brand-new, gopass-compatible age store on this device. A remote is optional.
create.passphraseHelpSsh: Encrypts the generated SSH key — set this before generating.
create.passphraseHelpAge: Encrypts the private key. Recommended for Android.
create.recipientHint: This seeds your store's recipients file.
create.remoteHint: Add a git remote to sync across devices. Without one the store is local-only and can be synced later.

validation.errUrlOrClearAuth: Enter a repository URL, or clear the authentication fields for a local-only store
validation.errUrlFormat: URL must be HTTPS or SSH format (e.g. git{'@'}host:user/repo.git)
validation.errSshKeyRequired: SSH private key is required for SSH remote URLs
validation.errAckRequired: Please acknowledge that this passphrase cannot be recovered.

err.errPushSuffix: — your store is saved locally and usable; the initial sync to the remote did not complete.

identity.heading: Recipients in this repository
identity.intro: This repository encrypts secrets to the recipients below. Paste the identity that matches one of them.
identity.noRecipientsAlert: This is a fresh repository with no recipients yet. Paste your identity — it will be the first.
identity.noMatchWarning: This identity doesn't match any recipient in the repository. Use a matching key, or ask the repo admin to add yours.
identity.reuseSshKey: Use my SSH key for decryption
identity.identityPlaceholder:
AGE-SECRET-KEY-...
or paste an SSH private key
identity.identityHint: Paste your age secret key (AGE-SECRET-KEY-...) or SSH private key
identity.fileUnlockHint: Enter the file's passphrase to verify it and reveal its public key. A wrong passphrase discards the file.
identity.unsupportedPq: Post-quantum age keys aren't supported yet.
identity.unsupportedPlugin: age-plugin identities aren't supported for decryption yet.
identity.malformed: This doesn't look like a valid age or SSH key.
identity.sshPassphrasePlaceholder: Passphrase to decrypt the SSH key
identity.sshVerifyHint: Enter the SSH key's passphrase and verify to confirm it matches a recipient.
identity.sealPassphraseHelpAge: Encrypts the private key. Recommended for Android.
identity.sealPassphraseWarning: Without a passphrase, your private key is stored in plaintext.

status.match: ✓ This identity matches a recipient in this repository.
status.verifySshHint: Verify your SSH key to confirm it matches.

validation.errIdentityFormat: Identity must be an age key (AGE-SECRET-KEY-...) or SSH private key
validation.errAckRequired: Please acknowledge that this passphrase cannot be recovered.

err.errWrongPassFile: Wrong passphrase — the file was discarded
